name: Peanut Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sift the flour into a measuring cup and level it off.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking soda, salt, shortening, peanut butter, milk, vanilla, and egg at low speed until stiff dough forms.
4. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown.
7. As soon as the cookies are done, press a chocolate kiss onto each one so it cracks around the edge.
8. Remove from the cookie sheets.
